name: Foreign Corporation Acquisition Interest Exclusion

eligibility.description: U.S. corporations acquiring foreign targets with at least a 3-year history of primarily foreign-source income.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The $5 million interest deduction limit for corporate acquisition indebtedness does not apply to debt issued to acquire a foreign corporation that derives substantially all of its income from non-U.S. sources.
